description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test libBLS that runs on push events to all branches except develop, master, beta, and stable. The workflow should have two jobs, build_linux and build_osx, running on ubuntu-18.04 and macos-11 respectively. Each job should extract the repository name, check out the code, install required packages, build dependencies, configure, build, and run tests. The linux job should also upload coverage reports to CodeCov.
